user_query: My sister and nephew are joining me on Day 6. He's 10 years old. What activities do I already have planned that would be fun for a kid?

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 6 > Ripley's Aquarium

node_data.name: Ripley's Aquarium
node_data.description: World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Ripley's Aquarium is explicitly described as an indoor family attraction perfect for kids, with interactive exhibits, touch tanks, and marine life that a 10-year-old would enjoy.

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 6 > Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride

node_data.name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
node_data.description: Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride is marked as a family/kid-friendly outdoor activity (ferry ride, bike rental, beaches and exploration) suitable for a 10-year-old.

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 6 > Sunset Grill

node_data.name: Sunset Grill
node_data.description: Family-friendly breakfast chain with classic options. Good for kids with simple menu and quick service.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Sunset Grill is a family-friendly breakfast with a kid-friendly menu and quick service, appropriate for starting the day with a 10-year-old.

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 6 > Island Cafe Picnic Lunch

node_data.name: Island Cafe Picnic Lunch
node_data.description: Casual picnic-style lunch on Centre Island. Sandwiches and snacks from the island cafe. Relaxed outdoor dining.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Island Cafe Picnic Lunch is a casual outdoor, family-friendly picnic option on Centre Island that would be relaxed and enjoyable for a child.
